Bus Timings

F1 Bus Timings Union Square Bus Station to Al Baraha and Return

November 11, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus F1 is a vital part of Dubai’s public transport system, providing a convenient and efficient connection between Union Square Bus Station and various key locations across the city. The route not only links bustling urban centers but also ensures seamless connectivity for commuters navigating through Dubai’s heritage areas and modern business hubs. Whether you’re a resident or a visitor, Bus F1 offers a reliable option for your daily travel.

Operational Details

Bus F1 operates frequently, ensuring that passengers have access to transport throughout the day. Here’s a breakdown of the bus timings:

From Union Square Bus Station From Al Baraha
04:15 04:29
05:10 05:24
05:35 05:49
06:05 06:19
06:30 06:44
06:50 07:04
07:10 07:24
07:30 07:44
07:50 08:04
08:10 08:24
08:30 08:44
08:50 09:04
09:10 09:24
09:30 09:44
10:00 10:14
10:30 10:44
11:00 11:14
11:30 11:44
12:00 12:14
12:30 12:44
13:00 13:14
13:30 13:44
14:00 14:14
14:30 14:44
15:00 15:14
15:30 15:44
16:05 16:19
16:35 16:49
17:02 17:16
17:24 17:38
17:46 18:00
18:12 18:26
18:34 18:48
18:59 19:13
19:24 19:38
19:49 20:03
20:14 20:28
20:35 20:49
20:59 21:13

21:45 21:59
22:15 22:29
22:50 23:04
23:25 23:39
00:00 00:14
01:03 01:17

Download PDF Bus F1

Bus F1 Timetable

For the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link to view the F1 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing and Payment: Bus F1 accepts Nol cards, Dubai’s unified contactless payment system for public transportation, making it easy to pay for your journey. The fare for Bus F01 varies based on the number of zones traveled and the type of Nol card you use:

  • Within 1 Zone: AED 3 (Silver/Personal Card), AED 6 (Gold Card), AED 4 (Red Ticket)

  • 2 Adjacent Zones: AED 5 (Silver/Personal Card), AED 10 (Gold Card), AED 6 (Red Ticket)
  • More than 2 Zones: AED 7.5 (Silver/Personal Card), AED 15 (Gold Card), AED 8.5 (Red Ticket)

To pay, tap your Nol card on the reader when boarding and exiting, and ensure it has at least AED 7.5, which can be topped up at any RTA service center or vending machine. For more details on Nol card options and fares, visit the Dubai Roads and Transport Authority (RTA) website.

Route Overview

Bus F1 operates a loop route that starts and ends at Union Square Bus Station, covering a range of essential stops that cater to commuters, shoppers, and tourists. Key stops along the route include:

  1. Union Square Bus Station A central hub located in the heart of Dubai, serving as a key point for various bus routes.

  2. Union Metro · 1 Convenient for metro passengers looking to transfer to buses.

3.

  1. Maktoum Hospital Road, Cemetery Providing access to important community services in the area.

  2. Naif Park A green space offering a break in the busy Naif district.

  3. Sabkha, Turnoff An important stop connecting to various parts of Old Dubai.

  4. Khaleej Road A major road linking key urban areas.

  5. Hyatt Regency Hotel A useful stop for hotel guests and visitors to this prominent Dubai landmark.

  6. Murar Jadeed A charming residential area with a community feel.

  7. Baraha, Eid Musallah A stop near a significant prayer ground, serving local residents.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Baraha, Street Connecting to various residential areas along the route.

  2. Al Baraha Mosque A prominent religious stop for worshippers.

  3. Hor Al Anz, Roundabout A busy intersection serving both residential and commercial areas.

  4. Rasheed Road A key route connecting important parts of the city.

  5. Nakhal A stop serving both residential commuters and businesses.

  6. Deira, Taxi Station A busy transit point for passengers connecting to taxis and other transport services.

  7. Union Metro · 2 Another convenient metro stop for commuters switching between transport modes.

  8. Union Square Bus Station The final stop, closing the loop at this major transportation hub in Dubai.

Accessibility Features

The buses are designed with low floors for easy boarding, designated seating for differently-abled individuals, and audio-visual systems to assist those with hearing or vision impairments.

Connectivity and Intersections

Key interchange points along the route include Union Square Bus Station and Union Metro Stations, ensuring seamless travel across the city. The route is designed to link both heritage areas and business hubs, making it an efficient option for residents and tourists.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Traveling on Bus F1 allows access to several notable attractions:

  • Union Square Bus Station

  • Maktoum Heritage Souq
  • Naif Park
  • Hyatt Regency Hotel
  • Al Baraha Mosque

Journey Experience

Tips and Travel Advice

To make your journey on Bus F1 as smooth as possible, consider traveling during off-peak hours to avoid crowds. Use the RTA app to stay updated on real-time schedules and routes. Don’t forget to keep your Nol card topped up, and always be mindful of your belongings during your journey. To further enhance your experience, plan ahead by checking for any route changes or service alerts through the RTA app, ensuring you’re always prepared for a hassle-free trip.

Bus F1 is an essential route within Dubai’s public transport system, offering a well-connected loop through key parts of the city.

For more information on schedules, fares, and updates, consult the official resources of the Dubai Roads and Transport Authority. With its reliable and accessible route, Bus F1 ensures that passengers can navigate the city with ease and efficiency, making it a crucial part of Dubai’s seamless transport network. To discover the complete network of Dubai buses, check out the full Dubai bus routes guide.
